MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was uncontested. DEFENDANT AMER SPORTS WINTER & OUTDOOR COMPANY's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint is Granted, for good cause shown. No opposition filed. The Court signed the order submitted by email. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
